query:
SELECT cnj, status_original, 
  JSON_KEYS(raw_payload) AS chaves,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.situation')) AS situation,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) AS status_field,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.court')) AS court,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.court_name')) AS court_name,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.subject')) AS subject,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.value')) AS valor,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.distribution_date')) AS dist_date,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.parties')) AS num_partes,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) AS num_movimentacoes
FROM processos 
WHERE raw_payload IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 3;

  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.distribution_date')) AS dist_date,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.parties')) AS num_partes,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) AS num_movimentacoes
